lineage.Process: CreateFishnet D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\FishNet500m.gdb\grid_base_500m "393019.9993 2496168.0263" "393019.9993 2496178.0263" 500 500 # # "505559.5063 2648196.4263" LABELS "393019.9993 2496168.0263 505559.5063 2648196.4263 PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_114E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",114.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]]" 面
Clip grid_base_500m 广州市县级市行政区_投影CGCS2000 D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\FishNet500m.gdb\grid_base_500m_Clip #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.1.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\FishNet500m.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>grid_base_500m_Clip</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>grid_id</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField grid_base_500m_Clip grid_id ""G" + str(!OBJECTID!).zfill(6)" "Python 3" # 文本 NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CopyMultiple "D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\FishNet500m.gdb\grid_base_500m_Clip FeatureClass" "D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\Fishnet for spaceReaserch.gdb" grid_base_500m_Clip "grid_base_500m_Clip FeatureClass grid_base_500m_Clip #"
DeleteField grid_base_500m_Clip F_ 删除字段
DeleteField grid_base_500m_Clip F_ 删除字段
DeleteField grid_base_500m_Clip F_ 删除字段
CalculateGeometryAttributes grid_base_500m_Clip "centroid_x CENTROID_X;centroid_y CENTROID_Y" # # # 与输入相同

ExportFeatures grid_base_500m_Clip "D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\Fishnet for spaceReaserch.gdb\grid_base_clip" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "grid_id "grid_id" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m_Clip,grid_id,0,255;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m_Clip,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m_Clip,Shape_Area,-1,-1;centroid_x "centroid_x" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m_Clip,centroid_x,-1,-1;centroid_y "centroid_y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_500m_Clip,centroid_y,-1,-1" #

ExportTable grid_base_clip D:\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\grid_base_clip.csv # NOT_USE_ALIAS "grid_id "grid_id" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,grid_base_clip,grid_id,0,255;centroid_x "centroid_x" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_clip,centroid_x,-1,-1;centroid_y "centroid_y" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_clip,centroid_y,-1,-1;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_clip,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,grid_base_clip,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

itemLocation.linkage: file://\\LRB\D$\研究生\论文\高新技术企业空间集聚\GIS_new_experiment\阶段一：企业动态变量研究\1、创建渔网\grid_base_clip.csv

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
